title: How do you bounce back from making the worst smart glasses of 2025? - Engadget
summary: One notable omission is navigation, which Hou said is a decision borne out of this newfound pursuit of focus. "Navigation sounds like an easy choice, but it is actually very hard to make it good," said Hou.
